name: BOY #1
prompt:
Instruction:
Apply the uploaded clothing item as a virtual try-on on the same child model described below. Preserve the exact physical identity, body proportions, pose, angles, facial features, hair, skin tone, and expression of the model. Maintain full realism, natural posture, and the original camera perspective. All clothing details are intentionally ignored and must not be described. The background must remain a clean, pure white fashion studio with soft, evenly diffused lighting and no visual distractions.

Model & Pose Description

Subject Type:
One young child male model.

Body & Posture:
The child model is standing in a relaxed, confident pose.
The torso is upright with a slight natural lean, giving a casual and approachable stance.
Body weight is primarily shifted onto one leg, creating gentle asymmetry.

Legs & Feet:
One leg is straight and grounded, supporting most of the body weight.
The opposite leg is slightly bent at the knee and extended outward, adding a playful, dynamic feel.
Feet remain flat and stable on the studio floor.

Arms & Hands:
Both arms are relaxed.
Hands are placed casually inside pocket areas, with no visible tension.
Elbows bend naturally, maintaining a soft silhouette.

Shoulders & Upper Body Alignment:
Shoulders are relaxed and level.
Upper body alignment remains natural and balanced.

Head Position & Neck:
Head is held upright with a subtle, natural tilt.
Neck alignment is neutral and proportional.

Facial Expression:
A soft, friendly smile.
Expression conveys ease, confidence, and youthful charm.

Gaze Direction:
Eyes are directed straight toward the camera.
Gaze feels natural, open, and engaged.

Hair & Facial Features (Identity Lock):
Short, neatly styled hair with a natural texture.
Balanced facial features with a smooth, youthful complexion.
Even skin tone, fully preserved.

Camera & Composition

Camera Height:
Camera positioned around mid-torso height relative to the child.

Camera Angle:
Straight-on angle with no tilt or distortion.

Framing:
Full-body framing.
Entire stance and leg positioning clearly visible with adequate spacing around the subject.

Background & Environment

Clean white studio background and floor surface.
No props, blocks, or additional objects present.
Soft, evenly diffused lighting with subtle shadows beneath the feet.
Background remains untouched and fully consistent.

Overall Impression:
A clean, modern studio portrait of a young child model standing in a relaxed, asymmetrical pose. The natural weight shift, casual hand placement, and gentle smile create a balanced and approachable composition. The scene is strictly focused on pose accuracy, identity preservation, and structural clarity for precise virtual try-on

Preserve the exact physical identity, body proportions, pose, angles, facial features, hair, skin tone, and expression of the child model. Model & Pose Description

• One child model (boy)

The scene features a clean studio composition with a single child model captured in a dynamic, playful standing pose.

⸻

Child Model (Standing Boy)

Body & Posture:
• The boy is standing with a playful, asymmetrical stance.
• One leg is firmly planted on the ground, supporting most of the body weight.
• The opposite leg is lifted outward to the side, slightly bent, creating a sense of motion and balance.
• Torso leans gently to one side, following the direction of the lifted leg.
• Overall posture feels relaxed, energetic, and natural.

Arms & Hands:
• Both hands are placed casually inside the pockets.
• Arms remain relaxed with no visible tension.
• Shoulders are loose and slightly angled.

Head & Expression:
• Head is tilted slightly to one side.
• Facial expression is soft, cheerful, and confident.
• Expression conveys playfulness and comfort.

Gaze Direction:
• Eyes are directed toward the camera.
• Gaze feels natural, friendly, and engaging.

⸻

Interaction & Object Relationship

• No props or supporting objects are present.
• The pose is fully self-supported.
• Movement and balance are conveyed solely through body positioning.

⸻

Hair & Facial Features (Identity Lock)

• Hair texture, length, and styling remain fully preserved.
• Facial proportions and individual identity remain unchanged.
• Skin tone remains accurate under soft studio lighting.

⸻

Camera & Composition

Camera Height:
• Positioned at child eye level.

Camera Angle:
• Straight-on angle with no tilt or distortion.

Framing:
• Full-body framing.
• Entire body and feet fully visible.
• No cropping of limbs.

⸻

Background & Studio Environment

• Pure white fashion studio background.
• Seamless white floor and backdrop.
• Soft, evenly diffused lighting.
• Subtle grounding shadow beneath the standing foot.

⸻

Overall Impression:

A clean, modern studio portrait featuring a boy in a playful, dynamic standing pose with one leg lifted. The relaxed hands-in-pocket stance, gentle torso lean, and cheerful expression create a lively yet controlled composition. Slightly oversized silhouettes and loose proportions reinforce a contemporary, comfortable kidswear aesthetic, with strict emphasis on identity preservation, pose accuracy, realism, and consistency for precise virtual try-on application.
